def negative_weak_random_function_used_for_security_token_generation():
    rule_id = "weak_random_function_used_for_security_token_generation"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "random.random or random.choice used to generate a security token, CSRF value, or password reset token."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
